arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Dayot Upamecano undergoes an arthroscopy as reports suggest he would be fit for a potential UCL final
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s horror double injury blow, which sees Dayot Upamecano and Alphonso Davies ruled out for many months with devastating injuries, has come as a real shock to the club. His comeback is planned for May. Should Bayern reach the Champions League final, Upamecano would definitely be available.

arts.ttl: Report: Sven Ulreich is set to stay on at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: It seems that Sven Ulreich has been at Bayern Munich forever, but it has been less than a decade now. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Report indicates Thomas Müller won’t get new contract from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Our Story: After two talks with the club it now seems clear: Thomas Müller (35) will not get a new contract from FC Bayern for the next Season @BILD_Sport pic.twitter.com/p9pyiQJoSV The club is looking at roles off the pitch for Müller, while he is not ready to hang his boots yet...

arts.ttl: Bayern prepared to make sacrifices to sign Wirtz, Sky suggests
arts.sum: Florian Wirtz is the number one priority in summer for the record champions.

arts.ttl: All of a sudden, Eric Dier seems on the verge of signing a new contract at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The 2024 January transfer window signing has proven to be a reliable back up and a popular member of the dressing room, but head coach Vincent Kompany clearly demonstrated throughout the season that he trusted the former Tottenham Hotspur player far less than the first choice center-back duo of Dayot Upamecano and Kim Min-Jae. So, Dier would not get a contract beyond 2025. For most of the 2024/25 season, reports indicated that Eric Dier would not get a new contract at Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern add Marseille winger to transfer targets
arts.sum: Luis Henrique could be on his way to Bavaria in summer according to the latest report from a German source.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Dayot Upamecano may miss rest of season
arts.sum: Bild understands that Dayot Upamecano (26) may miss the rest of the season due to a knee injury suffered during the international break. The centre-back played the whole 120 minutes as…

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern interested in Premier League goalkeeper
arts.sum: Bart Verbruggen has been linked with a move to the Allianz Arena if reports from England are to be believed.

arts.ttl: Report: Things not looking good for Bayern Munich’s Manuel Neuer after injury setback
arts.sum: The re-aggravated calf issue for Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer might be worse than originally thought per a report from Bild (via @iMiaSanMia ): Looking for more thoughts and discussions on Bayern Munich’s plan to work around the injuries to Alphonso Davies, Dayot Upamecano, and Manuel Neuer?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. St. Pauli : Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: It’s basically the best possible lineup Bayern can put out against Pauli. The bombshell news that Bayern just got is that Alphonso Davies and Dayot Upamecano are both out for extended periods of time (Davies up to 9 months, Upamecano up to 6 weeks), which is unwelcome news for Vincent Kompany.
